name: Mr.RC｜𝟎𝐱𝐔
fullText:
刚刚突然发现我中学时的发小 miguel @miiguelgarceran 入住推特了。

Bro可以说是我14岁的时候，启发了我的领导天赋，创业野心，还有让我的英文口语实现质的飞跃的男人 - 也是我第一个创业项目的伙伴。

除此之外，也是永远的朋友与对手。

我在做 @insidersdotbot ，miguel在做求职AI项目

我去年在做 https://t.co/Sx3KbBHl6P

fullText: JUST IN: Abdirashid Ismail Said, the main suspect in Minnesota’s alleged $11 million Medicaid fraud scheme, has reportedly "disappeared" without a trace.

fullText: JUST IN: U.S. military announces the deployment of "underwater drones" to clear mines in the Strait of Hormuz.

fullText: BREAKING: Hungarian PM Viktor Orbán has reportedly called opposition leader Péter Magyar to concede & congratulate his victory.

fullText: BREAKING: Polymarket officially projects Péter Magyar to become Hungary’s next prime minister, ousting Viktor Orbán after 16 years in power. https://t.co/mtTGtWGj05

fullText: JUST IN: Iran reportedly still retains "most of the components needed" to produce a nuclear bomb.
